metadata.title: Xpandia | Spanish Language Assurance, Localization & Cultural Intelligence
metadata.description: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, and digital product teams validate, localize, and culturally adapt Spanish experiences for Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.
metadata.ogTitle: Xpandia | Spanish that works for real users
metadata.ogDescription: Spanish language assurance, localization, and applied cultural intelligence for AI, SaaS, EdTech, and digital product teams.

hero.eyebrow: SPANISH EXPERTISE · AI · SAAS · EDTECH · DIGITAL PRODUCTS
hero.subheadline: Xpandia helps AI, SaaS, EdTech, and digital product teams validate, localize, and culturally adapt Spanish experiences for Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.

proof.label: 20+ YEARS
proof.text: Global localization and language quality experience

proof.label: SPANISH FOCUS
proof.text: LatAm, US Hispanic, and regional variants

proof.label: BUILT FOR
proof.text: AI, Product, Localization, CX, and EdTech teams

positioning.headline: Spanish quality is product quality.
positioning.body1: Your users experience your product through language: the answers your AI gives, the onboarding copy they follow, the support content they trust, and the messages that help them decide.
positioning.body2: Xpandia gives teams the expert Spanish judgment, structured review, cultural insight, and measurable quality signals they need to launch, improve, and scale with confidence.
positioning.body3: We combine senior linguistic expertise, applied cultural intelligence, and practical product judgment to help Spanish experiences perform in the real world.
positioning.calloutLine: The three layers behind Spanish that works.

servicesOverview.headline: The Spanish expertise your product needs.
servicesOverview.intro: Choose the right path based on what your team needs: validate what exists, create or improve Spanish content, or understand the audience behind the language.

cards.title: Language Assurance
cards.tagline: Validate Spanish before your users do.
cards.description: Structured audits and QA sprints for AI outputs, product flows, support content, launch readiness, and ongoing language quality governance.
cards.bestFor: AI products, chatbots, copilots, SaaS platforms, EdTech products, and support experiences already operating in Spanish or preparing to launch.
cards.whatYouGet: Quality scorecards, issue taxonomy, severity ratings, readiness recommendations, prioritized fixes, and executive-ready findings.

cards.title: Localization & Adaptation
cards.tagline: More than translated. Spanish that feels native, clear and trusted.
cards.description: Customized Spanish localization, transcreation, UX copy, documentation, and regional adaptation for digital products and content.
cards.bestFor: Teams launching websites, product interfaces, help centers, marketing campaigns, learning content, or customer communications in Spanish.
cards.whatYouGet: Localized copy, adapted messaging, terminology guidance, regional fit recommendations, QA-ready content, and publication-ready Spanish assets.

cards.title: Applied Cultural Intelligence
cards.description: Advisory, workshops, audits, and training that help teams understand Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences, cultural expectations, trust signals, tone, and market fit.
cards.bestFor: Product, marketing, CX, localization, and leadership teams that need to connect with Spanish-speaking users across the US, Canada, Europe, and LatAm.
cards.whatYouGet: Cultural insight, audience-specific recommendations, messaging guidance, training sessions, market fit findings, and actionable strategy.

methodology.headline: The method behind Spanish that works.
methodology.intro: Every engagement follows a clear process: define the audience, evaluate the experience, identify risks, and deliver recommendations your team can act on.

steps.title: Define
steps.body: We clarify your use case, audience, Spanish variant, product surface, business goal, and what "good" needs to mean for your team.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.body: We review language, meaning, tone, terminology, clarity, cultural fit, UX friction, and quality risks using structured criteria.

steps.title: Prioritize
steps.body: We separate critical issues from quick wins and organize findings by severity, business impact, and implementation effort.

steps.title: Improve
steps.body: We deliver recommendations, rewrites, standards, scorecards, and next steps your product, localization, AI, or CX team can execute.

deliverables.headline: Evidence your team can act on.
deliverables.body: Every Xpandia engagement turns expert judgment into practical evidence: scorecards, findings, examples, recommendations, and decision-ready guidance.

cards.title: Quality Scorecard
cards.body: Measurable scoring across the criteria that matter for your use case: accuracy, clarity, naturalness, tone, terminology, regional fit, cultural fit, UX friction, and risk.

cards.title: Issue Taxonomy
cards.body: A structured list of what is breaking quality, where it happens, how severe it is, and what your team should fix first.

cards.title: Executive Readout
cards.body: A concise summary for product, AI, localization, CX, or leadership teams with risks, opportunities, and recommended next steps.

cards.title: Remediation Guidance
cards.body: Practical recommendations, rewrites, examples, and standards to help your team improve Spanish quality without slowing down delivery.

scorecard.title: Quality Scorecard
scorecard.footer: OUTPUT SAMPLE · USE CASE: SUPPORT COPILOT · VARIANT: es-MX · REVIEWER: XPANDIA SENIOR

builtFor.headline: For teams building products and experiences in Spanish.

cards.title: AI & ML Product Teams
cards.body: Validate Spanish outputs from chatbots, tutors, copilots, agents, and generative AI experiences before users rely on them.

cards.title: SaaS & Product Teams
cards.body: Improve Spanish product flows, onboarding, UI copy, forms, errors, and launch readiness.

cards.title: EdTech Teams
cards.body: Make Spanish learning experiences clear, natural, culturally relevant, and pedagogically effective.

cards.title: Localization Teams
cards.body: Strengthen Spanish quality, vendor oversight, review workflows, terminology, and sign-off processes.

cards.title: CX & Support Teams
cards.body: Improve Spanish help content, support macros, chatbot responses, and customer-facing communication.

cards.title: Marketing & Growth Teams
cards.body: Adapt Spanish messaging, landing pages, campaigns, and conversion copy for real Hispanic and Spanish-speaking audiences.

buyer.headline: Built for the leaders responsible for Spanish quality.

finalCta.headline: Know where your Spanish stands — and what to do
finalCta.body: In a focused diagnostic call, we review your Spanish surface, understand your audience, product context, timeline, and business goal, and recommend the right path forward: an audit, an AI QA sprint, a localization engagement, a CQ talk, or a quality roadmap.
finalCta.pricingNote: Diagnostics, audits, AI QA sprints, localization engagements, CQ talks, and fractional advisory are scoped based on your product, audience, complexity, timeline and business priority.
